title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used by the Williams F1 Team to visualize driver and team cognitive patterns during racing. The "Pattern of Thought" visualization system processes telemetry and decision-making data, with designs displayed on driver helmets and race suits.
